## What
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Why
Context and motivation for the change. What problem does it solve?

## How
Implementation approach. Any key decisions or trade-offs?

## Fixes
Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing Done
How did you test this change?
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing (describe scenarios)
- [ ] All tests pass locally

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests passed locally with my changes
- [ ] I ran `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy`
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` and `npm run format`

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Before/after UI changes, error messages, etc.

## Additional Notes
Any other information for the reviewer?
